    • OS Compatibility Audit
    • Running Analysis Pipelines

    Configure the full session environment in one call

    setup_session.Rd

    The recommended way to initialise a session before running any analysis pipeline. At minimum, platform and data_path must be provided – either here or via set_platform and set_data_root – before any run_*() function will execute.

    setup_session(
  trial = NULL,
  platform = NULL,
  data_path = NULL,
  report_root = NULL,
  output_root = NULL
)

    Arguments

    trial

    Character. TRIAL label (e.g. "moderna_mock"). Sets the TRIAL environment variable read by all run_*() functions.

    platform

    Character. Required before running analyses. One of "linux", "win", or "auto". See set_platform.

    data_path

    Character. Required before running analyses. Absolute path to the directory containing analysis-ready data files (the equivalent of data_clean/). See set_data_root.

    report_root

    Character. Absolute path to the project root containing the module directories. See set_report_root.

    output_root

    Character. Absolute path for redirecting module output. See set_output_root.

    Value

    Invisibly returns a named list of the previous values for each setting that was changed, so the caller can restore them with on.exit(do.call(setup_session, old)).

    Details

    Any argument left as NULL is skipped, leaving its current value unchanged. Use session_status to verify the configuration at any time.

    Examples

    if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Minimum required configuration
setup_session(
  platform  = "linux",
  data_path = "/path/to/correlates_reporting2/data_clean"
)

# Full configuration
setup_session(
  trial       = "moderna_mock",
  platform    = "linux",
  data_path   = "/path/to/correlates_reporting2/data_clean",
  report_root = "/path/to/correlates_reporting2",
  output_root = "/results/correlates/2026-03-04"
)

# Windows machine
setup_session(
  trial       = "moderna_mock",
  platform    = "win",
  data_path   = "C:/data/correlates_reporting2/data_clean",
  report_root = "C:/projects/correlates_reporting2"
)

# Restore previous settings on exit
old <- setup_session(platform = "win", data_path = "/new/data")
on.exit(do.call(setup_session, old))
} # }

    Contents
